providers.label: Codex Cloud
providers.description: Cloud execution for repository-aware implementation work when credentials and workspace access are available through a secure backend.

providers.label: Gemini Coding Provider
providers.description: Future cloud provider route for coding-capable Gemini models through backend-owned provider credentials.

providers.label: Hugging Face Inference
providers.description: Backend-owned Hugging Face provider route for inference or free-tier model evaluation when a server-side token is configured.

providers.label: Gemma / Ollama Local
providers.description: Local Gemma-compatible provider route through a backend-side Ollama runtime. Browser JavaScript never receives local runtime credentials.

providers.label: Local Codex
providers.description: Local execution for filesystem audits, patch generation, verification commands, and browser review.

providers.label: Manual Review
providers.description: Human-controlled workflow for sensitive files, policy decisions, and final approval boundaries.
